title: FantasyPvP Packs
description:
FantasyPvP's texture pack collection

formerly known as FantasyPvP_256
body:
# FantasyPvP's PvP Packs

formerly known as FantasyPvP_256

### Before downloading - Check out the gallery to see what armour theme you like

### Instructions for use

- Navigate to one of the versions above
- Download the pack labelled 'Base' for the majority of the textures
- Download whichever Diamond armour sets you want eg: 'Classic'
- Place all downloaded packs in .minecraft/resourcepacks
- Enable the base pack & a diamond armour set of your choosing, ensuring that the diamond armour set is above the base pack in the menu

### Pre-Release

- these packs are a work in progress
- if any pack is visible in the gallery, but is not included in any of the versions, it will be released in a future version!

### Features

- Swords and equipment have a resoloution of 512x
- Blocks are 16x
- The pack contains custom sky overlays (a work in progress)
- There is also a custom overlay for Hypixel Bridge Duels
- in my opinion these packs pair well with sildur's vibrant shaders if you like to use shaders.

### Ways you can support me if you like what I do

- Sharing this page with your friends
- Subscribing to my YouTube channel @fantasypvp
- Adding me on Discord @zxq5 / joining my discord server (link on this page)

### answers to some possible questions

Have you made packs before? 
 - yes, I've been making packs for several years

Do you publish your packs anywhere other than modrinth?
  - My old pack is on curseforge and as of 02/03/2024 has around 25k downloads
  - I plan to re-release those original packs on this page in the near future (see Legacy in the gallery)

What is your preferred paint software?
  - previously paint .NET, currently Krita.
